programme.title: Live Emirates FA Cup
programme.desc: Sutton United v Shrewsbury Town (Kick-off 5.15pm). Coverage of the second-round tie at VBS Community Stadium. National League outfit Sutton wrote themselves into FA Cup folklore back in the 1988/89 season when they defeated Coventry City just two seasons after the Sky Blues had lifted the trophy, and they also reached the fifth round in the 2016/17 campaign. They will to take another Football League scalp today, but it would perhaps only be deemed a minor upset given the Shrews' struggles in League Two so far this term
